calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessica Walker, via Zoom, for Jason Kohout, Executor.

The court confirms with counsel that FANDL & Co. is a separate accounting entity, not affiliated with her firm. The court questions whether the preceding should have been disclosed. Counsel confirms that Wayne Leuders is a partner in her firm. The court questions whether the preceding was mentioned in the first accounting. Counsel advises that she did not handle the first accounting and reports that she does not believe that her firm is partners with FANDL & Co.

The court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.
